WebXR · Passthrough AR

Head Campus LAN — Live Topology

Each device floats as its own 3D node — including a real spinning 3D model (Apex Prism Tower). Four corner buttons control the scene: Move (top-left), Connect (top-right), Save (bottom-left), Delete Link (bottom-right), plus Reset Layout below them. Hold a controller's grip button and move your hand up/down to resize the whole layout. Your layout is saved automatically and restored next time you open this page.

Walk around the topology · Press the Oculus button to exit AR
